metadata.description: Claude skill for Current-RMS Liquid templates — stops AI assistants from using Shopify Liquid syntax that doesn't exist in Current-RMS

plugins.name: current-rms-liquid
plugins.description: Write and debug Liquid markup for Current-RMS document layouts and discussion templates (quotations, rental agreements, invoices, delivery notes, barcode labels, emails). Enforces the documented Current-RMS dialect: correct objects, filters, tags, PDF renderer limits, and custom-field rules — no Shopify-only syntax.
